name: Darline Graham Nordone
subject: Friend, will you do me a favor?
body:
Lindsey's 60th Birthday is on July 9th. Will you sign his card? | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Everyone has someone they look up to and greatly admire. **For me, that person is my big brother, Lindsey Graham.**

I am blessed to have a brother as loving and dedicated as Lindsey. He has always been there for me, even when we unfortunately lost both our parents within 15 months of each other, when Lindsey was 22 and I was only 13. Lindsey was in college and instead of moving on with his own life, he came home every weekend to make sure I was okay. Eventually, he even adopted me.

**Lindsey's caring for people is the cornerstone of his service to our nation.** Lindsey is incredibly fortunate to have such a dedicated group of friends and supporters who believe in him. He doesn't often ask for help, instead spending his time helping others.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28865380:27735999469:m:1:877327319:879D34A9256D7CC7C75C5ADD372A1854:r)**But Friend, today I am asking for your help. Lindsey's 60th Birthday is on July 9th. With his busy schedule in his campaign to win the Republican nomination for President, I doubt if he's had time to think about turning 60!**

I know how much it means to Lindsey to receive personal birthday wishes from friends like you, Friend. That is why I hope you will help make this one of his best birthdays ever by [**letting him know that you will stand with him as he embarks on the biggest challenge of his life**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28865380:27735999469:m:1:877327319:879D34A9256D7CC7C75C5ADD372A1854:r).

So please, [**take a moment to sign his 60th Birthday Card and leave him a personal message**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28865380:27735999469:m:1:877327319:879D34A9256D7CC7C75C5ADD372A1854:r), so we can include it in the Birthday Album we are preparing to give him at his birthday party.

I'm excited about Lindsey's decision to run for President of the United States because I know Lindsey brings the much-needed principled leadership, conservative values, and solid experience that our nation's next Commander-in-Chief must have.

[**If you agree that we need Lindsey in the White House, I hope you help make this his best birthday yet by showing your support and signing his 60th Birthday Card right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28865380:27735999469:m:1:877327319:879D34A9256D7CC7C75C5ADD372A1854:r)

>From my family to yours, I want to thank you for all you are doing to help Lindsey win.

Sincerely,

Darline Graham Nordone

P.S. In addition, to give my brother Lindsey a solid boost in his campaign for the White House, [**I hope after you sign his Birthday Card, you will send along a generous contribution of $15, $25 or even $50 to his campaign**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28865380:27735999469:m:1:877327319:879D34A9256D7CC7C75C5ADD372A1854:r). I know it will mean a great deal to Lindsey that so many of his friends are willing to stand with him as he takes on the challenge of running for President of the United States and working to restore America's greatness. Thanks again - Darline

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28865380:27735999469:m:1:877327319:879D34A9256D7CC7C75C5ADD372A1854:r)
|

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWe6y3519N).

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: Fellow Conservative: the IRS is going to hate this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Defeating the Washington Machine starts with driving a stake through the heart of the IRS.

My bold 14.5% Fair and Flat tax proposal does that by returning over $2 trillion to everyday Americans by ending the workers tax - the largest tax many Americans pay - and allowing everyone to pay the same rate.

Please take a few moments to read my email below and join the movement to take our country back.

Rand

* * *

**From** : Rand Paul [Rand.Paul@randpaul2016.com]
**To** : Fellow Conservative [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
**Subject** : The IRS is going to hate this
Fellow Conservative:

Tear it up.

Blow it up.

Start over.

Drive a stake through the heart of the IRS.

**[Will you stand with me as I pledge to make passing the largest and boldest tax cut in American history a centerpiece of my first term as President of the United States](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871683:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, this won't make me popular in Washington.

The lobbyists and lawyers who game their connections to the Washington Machine are already lining up against me.

But I'm running for President to end the Big Government status-quo.

We need to pull our economy out of the ditch it has settled into under President Obama.

And that starts with my $2 trillion dollar tax cut.

It's flat. It's simple. And it's fair.

No more FICA ripping thousands of dollars each year out of Americans' paychecks.

That workers tax - the biggest tax most Americans pay - is slashed to zero. It's gone.

My plan also kicks the IRS out of your life with a simple one-page form and one tax rate.

Fellow Conservative, the economy has sputtered along under President Obama's disastrous high tax policies.

By cutting taxes for all Americans and putting the federal government on a diet, my plan will grow the economy 22% faster than anything we have experienced the last 6 years.

When Ronald Reagan slashed taxes, he ignited an economic boom that carried through two decades.

He believed the money you earn is yours and you know how to spend it better than government bureaucrats.

I agree and I believe it's time our party embrace his philosophy that government is not the solution to our problems.

That's why I've proposed the biggest and boldest tax cut in American history.

But the special interest groups and their establishment pals in Congress will target me as "Enemy #1."

So I need to know you will stand with me.

**[Please sign your"Fair and Flat Tax Now!" petition and let me know you are with me as I pledge to make driving a stake through the heart of the IRS a centerpiece of my first term as President](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871683:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)**.

And after you sign your petition, **[please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help me spread this message](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871683:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)** to the voters in the key early states through email, online and social media ads.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871684:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871685:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871686:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871687:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871683:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871683:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871688:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871689:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28871690:27736772883:m:1:879035888:0F38066681FCC97858A996DB31D1A0EA:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Jeff Miller, Perry 2016
subject: The next President of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perry for President, Inc
body:
| | **** Friend,

I hope you had a great Fourth of July weekend. Celebrating the freedoms and remembering the sacrifices that have made our country great takes on even more meaning for me this year.

As we begin looking for the leader who will take America through the challenges of rebuilding economically and diplomatically after the failed Obama years, it's clear we need someone with a proven record of success and an optimistic vision for the future. **Gov. Perry is the tested leader America needs, which is why our team is working around the clock to make sure he is the next President of the United States.**

June was a great month and I cannot thank you enough for your support. [**As we continue to gain momentum,**_**I ask for your help - $5, $10, $25 or any contribution you can make.**_](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI5OTAyODkS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwNTQ5NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

I look forward to keeping you updated as the campaign continues.

Best,

Jeff Miller
Campaign Manager, Perry for President

**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI5OTAyODkS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwNTQ5NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI5OTAyODkS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwNTQ5NTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**
---
